title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Indian Reserve Forces Act, 1888; and (2) It shall come into force on such day1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint in this behalf.
footnote: 1. The Act came into force on the 26th may, 1888, see Gazette of India of same date, Pt. I, p. 239
